title: Flemmen & Co. Law Firm in Oslo
meta-description: Flemmen & Co - A law firm dedicated to helping you with a range of legal needs and challenges.
intro_1: Flemmen & Co Advokatfirma was established by Christian Flemmen Johansen and the team he had built up over many years, all of whom came from Elden Advokatfirma.
intro_2: Christian Flemmen Johansen was an associate and subsequently a partner at Elden Advokatfirma AS for {{years}} years. Flemmen & Co represents a continuation of an established legal practice, working in collaboration with experienced lawyers, auditors and other professional partners.
intro_3: Flemmen & Co regularly assists both smaller and larger clients with advisory services, dispute resolution, negotiations and proceedings before the various courts. Further details of our areas of expertise are set out below.
sikring: Asset preservation through arrest and similar measures
article_title_01: Partner Leaves Elden After 16 Years – Starts His Own Firm
article_text_01: “The idea has been there for a long time,” says Christian Flemmen Johansen, who has established the law firm Flemmen & Co.
article_text_02: Christian Flemmen Johansen has founded his own law firm, accompanied by two colleagues from Elden.
article_title_03: Leaving Elden With All His Own Clients
article_text_03: Christian Flemmen Johansen (39) is one of the most profitable partners at the law firm Elden.
article_text_04: Partner Christian Flemmen Johansen starts own firm after 16 years at law firm Elden.
article_title_05: Flemmen is striking out on his own
article_text_05: Investing: Recently, Christian Flemmen Johansen worked alongside over a hundred colleagues at Elden. Now, he has founded the law firm Flemmen & Co, which currently has three employees.
article_title_06: Construction Consultant Acquitted of Fraud Charges
article_text_06: Initially, the construction consultant was sentenced to two and a half years in prison for multiple frauds. In the appeal round, he was acquitted of several charges, and his sentence was more than halved.
article_text_07: Media coverage of lawyer Christian Flemmen Johansen
article_title_08: Called Norway's Largest Fraud Case: Three of Five Defendants Didn't Show Up
article_text_08: It was an unusual start when the Oslo District Court was set to hear a major crypto fraud case.
